meta.description: The Crude Oracle Investment Watchlist. Monitored names only — NOT recommendations. SAMPLE content with placeholder figures. See docs/DAILY_UPDATE_GUIDE.md.

companies.debt_note: Gearing within target range; balance sheet resilient at mid-cycle prices.
companies.investment_theme: Capital discipline and shareholder returns through the cycle.
companies.risk: Oil price downside; windfall tax exposure; energy transition capex pressure.

companies.debt_note: Low leverage after multi-year deleveraging cycle.
companies.investment_theme: Low break-even inventory depth; variable dividend framework.
companies.risk: WTI weakness; service cost inflation; inventory exhaustion debate.

companies.debt_note: Project-financed; long-term contracted cash flows underpin leverage.
companies.investment_theme: Contracted liquefaction capacity with expansion optionality.
companies.catalyst: FID on expansion trains; new SPA announcements.
companies.risk: Global LNG oversupply later in the decade; construction cost overruns.

companies.commodity_exposure: Fee-based volumes; limited direct price exposure
companies.investment_theme: Toll-road cash flows with inflation-linked tariffs.
companies.catalyst: Permian takeaway expansions; distribution growth guidance.
companies.risk: Volume declines in mature basins; regulatory/permitting risk.

companies.debt_note: Net debt reduced through cycle; strong free cash flow conversion.
companies.investment_theme: International and offshore capex upcycle; digital/production services mix shift.
companies.risk: US onshore activity softness; oil price-driven capex cuts.

companies.debt_note: Restructured balance sheet; refinancing profile manageable.
companies.investment_theme: Tight floater supply and multi-year contract cover driving dayrate leverage.
companies.catalyst: New contract fixtures at leading-edge dayrates.
companies.risk: High operating leverage; oil price sensitivity; contract cliff risk.

companies.debt_note: Moderate leverage against vessel values near cycle highs.
companies.investment_theme: Ageing global fleet, low orderbook, and longer voyage distances from rerouting.
companies.catalyst: Seasonal rate strength; fleet renewal announcements.
companies.risk: Rate volatility; ordering cycle restart; disruption premium unwinding.

companies.debt_note: Low leverage; countercyclical balance sheet strength.
companies.investment_theme: Structural refining capacity tightness in the Atlantic Basin.
companies.catalyst: Turnaround season completion; margin capture data.
companies.risk: Margin normalisation; demand destruction; renewable diesel economics.

companies.debt_note: RBL facility headroom adequate; hedge book covers near-term capex.
companies.investment_theme: Deep value on UKCS assets if fiscal regime stabilises; consolidation candidate.
companies.catalyst: UK fiscal policy clarity; reserves updates; M&A.
companies.risk: Windfall tax extension; licensing policy; decommissioning liabilities.

companies.debt_note: Strong investment-grade; dividend covered at conservative price decks.
companies.risk: Long-run demand uncertainty; political/windfall tax risk.

companies.debt_note: Pre-revenue; funded for current drilling programme only.
companies.investment_theme: High-impact wells with multi-bagger potential and near-total downside on failure.
companies.risk: EXTREME: dry-hole risk, dilution, funding risk. Speculative category.

companies.debt_note: Post-restructuring capital structure; watch covenant headroom.
companies.investment_theme: Asset value recovery play post-Chapter 11; equity is an option on gas prices.
companies.catalyst: Refinancing; asset sales; gas price recovery.
companies.risk: EXTREME: further restructuring, illiquidity, total loss possible. Speculative category.
